summary.lv: Natrix meklē elektronikas inženieri, kas projektēs un uzturēs sakaru un datu pārraides infrastruktūru autonomajām sauszemes platformām (UGV), integrējot VPN, SATCOM un taktiskos tīkla risinājumus.
summary.en: Natrix is looking for an electronics engineer to design and maintain communications and data transmission infrastructure for unmanned ground vehicles (UGV), integrating VPN, SATCOM, and tactical networking solutions.
